meaning: n.<美>橡皮套靴,胶底运动靴,<俚>侦察vi.悄悄走,秘密行走,侦察adj.偷偷做的
examples: A senior gumshoe of Guangzhou expresses.
There's a big difference between great white sharks and serial killers and it comes down to that old gumshoe standard: motive.
He hired manuscript expert and former private gumshoe Joe Nickell to slog through archives and quiz experts.
They had learned that Jenkins hired a two-bit gumshoe named Thomas ("Papa Bear") Miller--a New Orleans operative with a long, sometimes violent criminal record.
